business_description: Senior BI Developer and Data Analyst offering full-stack data analytics consultancy — from data modelling and warehousing through to dashboard development and reporting.
target_audience: Businesses and hiring managers seeking a freelance BI developer or data analyst
usp: End-to-end knowledge of the full data analytics stack — from raw data ingestion to polished, decision-ready dashboards
style_notes: Professional, clean, human — explicitly NOT AI-generated looking. Client dislikes the current colour scheme and wants the site to feel considered and distinctive, not templated.
color_preferences: Professional palette typical for portfolios — neutral base with a strong single accent. Avoid gradients, neons, and anything that looks like a Canva template.
brief_summary: Personal portfolio and CV site for Akin Yavuz, Senior BI Developer based in Dumfries & Galloway. Showcases data analytics expertise, projects, and CV. Professional tone, clean design that feels human and intentional — not AI-slop.
